feat.name: Sweeping Tail
feat.prerequisite: *Beastmaster Dedication*; animal companion with a tail unarmed attack
feat.text:
Your companion swings its tail powerfully. Your companions with a qualifying unarmed attack learn the Sweeping Tail activity.  
  
 **Sweeping Tail** This companion makes two tail Strikes against different creatures within its reach, increasing its multiple attack penalty as normal. On a hit, it pushes a target back 5 feet or 10 feet on a critical hit. This is forced movement.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
